typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	varSSISOps_DisableBIxAuditing as boolean (),
	varSSISOps_GroupNames as string (),
	varTOs as string (),
	varTransferFile as string (),
	varTransferOrder as string (),
	pkgParamBatchID as integer (),
	pkgParamDestinationConnectionString as string (),
	pkgParamInterfaceID as integer (),
	pkgParamPackageID as integer (),
	pkgParamSourceConnectionString as string (),
	pkgParamSourceStoredProcedure as string ()
}

source(output(
		{} as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: '[usp_SelectInboundTranferOrder_CA] ?',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> OLEDBSource
OLEDBSource sink(input(
		Line as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	saveOrder: 10000,
	mapColumn(
		Line = FileContents)) ~> FlatFileDestination
